resources.string: Permission granted — pick pets and tap \"Show selected pets\".
This app needs permission to draw over other apps.
No sprite sheets found in assets/. Add petXX.png files.
Pets roam the screen in different directions and speeds. Drag a pet to move it; tap a pet to open this app. Uncheck pets and tap \"Show selected pets\" to remove them.
Your selected pets roam across the home and lock screen.
Live wallpapers aren\'t supported on this device.
